description: NO tokens; only keepalives until injected t>=31s past start. Test harness must advance `time.monotonic()` past first_token_deadline_s (30.0 default for non-reasoning).
name: abort-first-token-deadline
notes: Test harness MUST inject now_s >= start_time_s + 30.0 between calls to check_deadline() to reproduce the abort. The fixture bytes alone do not encode time progression.
